summary: Completed comprehensive backend API testing for DressApp Phase 2. Tested authentication, user management, closet operations, listings, transactions, and AI stylist functionality. 29/34 tests passed (85.3% success rate).

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error when creating valid transaction

minor_issues.issue: Multipart form data with image fails with JSON parsing error

expected_behaviors.issue: Returns empty list after items are deleted
expected_behaviors.impact: None - expected behavior in test environment

expected_behaviors.issue: Returns empty list in public browse
expected_behaviors.impact: None - expected behavior in test environment

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix transaction creation endpoint (500 error) and multipart stylist image handling. All other core functionality working correctly including authentication, closet management, listings, and AI stylist text-based interactions.
